title: Vending profits
abstract: The snack vending apparatus comprises, a housing, a transparent door, a plurality of containers, multiple tubes, one or more mixing units, a bag storage member, a vacuum pickup element, a thermal sealer, a serving bin, a control unit, base elements, solenoid valve assembly, a heating element, and a secondary door. A consumer selects an assortment of nuts or condiments placed in the containers. The control unit actuates the solenoid valve assembly to transfer the nuts from the relevant containers to the mixing unit. The control unit actuates the heating element if required. A bag is picked up from the bag storage member by the vacuum pickup element to receive the mixed warm nuts from the mixing unit. The thermal sealer seals the filled bag. The filled bag is dispensed to the consumer via the secondary door.
claims: Claims A snack vending apparatus comprising: a housing; a plurality of containers connected to the housing; multiple tubes connected to the containers; one or more mixing units connected to the tubes; a heating element for the mixing units.
